prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年长安大学在上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约13979名、13075名、13919名、14532名、11525名。2025年位次大幅前移至11525名，较2024年回升约30 00名，主要因当年仅保留物理+化学一个专业组，录取门槛整体抬高。近5年位次波动较大，2025年基准位次约11525名；该校在上海招生计划2021–2025年均为12 人，2026年增至13人，小幅扩招约8.3%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第89名（2 026年），近年排名稳定在85–92名区间，属中游211院校；该校在声誉评价文件中无相关记录；抖音学校热度总排名第83位，评价为"一般"，综合热度较低；未 见明显投档断档或负面舆情信号，报考心理层面无明显扰动；第五轮学科评估中，交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交 通运输等招生专业直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业以工科为主（车辆工程、电气工程、计算机、电子信息、能源动力等），其中 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐但明显降温，整体工科热度偏正面。上海2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人大幅增加约35.4%， 竞争显著加剧；长安大学位于陕西西安，属异地高校，在上海无本地招生倾斜；该校在上海招生人数极少（12–13人）， 本地考生对其关注度相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11525名、2026年小幅扩招1人（+8.3%）、上海考生总数大幅增加约35.4%以及工科专业热度偏正面等因素： 扩招对位次有后移压力，但考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应更为显著，推动位次前移。经权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约11901名，较2025年11525名小幅后移约376名，区间1 1401–12401名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（计算机长安学堂）（含计算机科学与技术）
- 智能车辆工程
- 计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 能源与动力工程
- 工科试验班（新能源长安学堂）（含新能源科学与工程）
- 交通运输。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 道路桥梁与渡河工程
- 道路桥梁与渡河工程（国际工程班）
- 自动化类（含自动化、机器人工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11901名，区间11401–12401名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主攻方向（电气、能源、交通运输），一档（计算机类、智能车辆）可冲刺，三档（道路桥梁、自动 化）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<11401名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Chang'an University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 13979, 13075, 13919, 14532, and 11525 respectively. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 11525, recovering about 3000 places from 2024, mainly due to the retention of only one subject group (Physics + Chemistry) that year, raising the overall admission threshold. Rankings have fluctuated considerably over the past five years, with a baseline ranking of about 11525 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai was 12 students each year from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 13 in 2026, a small expansion of about 8.3%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 89th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 85–92 range in recent years, placing it among mid-tier 211 institutions. The university has no relevant records in reputation evaluation documents. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 83rd, with a rating of 'average,' indicating relatively low comprehensive popularity. No obvious signs of admission gaps or negative public opinion are observed, so there is no significant psychological disturbance in application behavior. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering and Transportation, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, enrollment majors are mainly engineering (Vehicle Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Energy and Power, etc.), among which Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended, while Computer Science is recommended but has significantly cooled down. Overall, engineering majors have a positive popularity. In 2026, the total number of Shanghai college entrance examination candidates is about 66,700, a substantial increase of about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, an out-of-province institution with no local enrollment preference in Shanghai. The university enrolls very few students in Shanghai (12–13), so local candidates have relatively limited attention to it.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11525, a small enrollment expansion of 1 student in 2026 (+8.3%), a significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates, and the generally positive popularity of engineering majors: the expansion exerts backward pressure on rankings, but the intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers is more significant, pushing rankings forward. After weighing these factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 11901, a slight backward shift of about 376 places from 11525 in 2025, with a range of 11401–12401.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer Chang'an Academy) (including Computer Science and Technology)
- Intelligent Vehicle Engineering
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Engineering Pilot Class (New Energy Chang'an Academy) (including New Energy Science and Engineering)
- Transportation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering
- Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering (International Engineering Class)
- Automation Class (including Automation, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 11901, with a range of 11401–12401. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electrical, Energy, Transportation) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer, Intelligent Vehicle) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Road and Bridge, Automation) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<11401), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
